title: Empty Group Chat
lyricSeed:
My phone lights up but nobody's there
An empty group chat, does anybody care
Whoa-oh, the little screen glows blue
A thousand contacts, none of them are you
Doo-wop, doo-wop, I type and I delete
Modern kind of lonely, bittersweet
